Question: Determine if each sequence is arithmetic. If so, indicate the common difference. ⓐ $$9 , 20 , 31 , 42 , 53 , 64 \text{,} \text{unicode[:ddot.]}$$ ⓑ $$12 , 6 , 0 , -6 , -12 , -18 \text{,} \text{unicode[:ddot.]}$$ ⓒ $$7 , 1 , 10 , 4 , 13 , 7 \text{,} \text{unicode[:ddot.]}$$
Answer: ⓐ The sequence is arithmetic with common difference $$d = 11$$ . ⓑ The sequence is arithmetic with common difference $$d = -6$$ . ⓒ The sequence is not arithmetic as all the differences between the consecutive terms are not the same.

Question: Determine if each sequence is arithmetic. If so, indicate the common difference. ⓐ $$-4 , 4 , 2 , 10 , 8 , 16 \text{,} \text{unicode[:ddot.]}$$ ⓑ $$-3 , -1 , 1 , 3 , 5 , 7 \text{,} \text{unicode[:ddot.]}$$ ⓒ $$7 , 2 , -3 , -8 , -13 , -18 \text{,} \text{unicode[:ddot.]}$$
Answer: ⓐ The sequence is not arithmetic as all the differences between the consecutive terms are not the same. ⓑ The sequence is arithmetic with common difference $$d = 2 .$$ ⓒ The sequence is arithmetic with common difference $$d = -5 .$$
